name: TorrentAtlas
releaseNotes: Adds legal-use public index search shortcuts for TorrentGalaxy, LimeTorrents, RARBG legacy mirrors, The Pirate Bay, EZTV, KAT, 1337x, BTSOW, BitSearch, SolidTorrents, and TorrentDownload. Official/open sources remain direct-download results; public index entries open provider search pages inside TorrentAtlas instead of scraping and auto-adding magnets.
